series_metadata.series_description: This includes all records and reports compiled during the course of administering a construction project. This series includes, but is not limited to: Contract, Proposal, general correspondence, material testing documentation reports, construction plans and field measurements. Forms: Estimates(SiteManager generated), daily work reports, inspection forms, change orders and supporting documentation, contractor payrolls and correspondence, earthwork drawings, cross section calculations, survey notes, aerial engineering data, pile test load reports, tickets, EEO reports and records, computation sheets, railroad invoice transmittals, affidavit as to non-spec materials, piling records, extra work contract estimates, final report, request to sublet, progress schedule and supplements, daily construction record for bituminous concrete pavement, request to waive liquidated damages, dispute and claim documentation, report on compaction, in-place density using nuclear method, validation of final pay quantities, field notes, compliance data report.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper documents converted into scanned electronic form ; Electronic: electronic documents (e.g. emails, scanned images, etc.) life of completed construction project but not less than eight (8) years project has been finalized
